summary: Backfilled external_source for all 77 deals. Tested meeting routing workflow with 1 meeting. Documented routing workflow for remaining 327 meetings.
issues: Brief mentioned 'leadership-*' pattern but actual ID was 'cs-lead-*' - handled both patterns
Test meeting had low relevance scores (0.10/0.15) so no deal linkage was appropriate
recommendations: For routing remaining 327 meetings, use /zo/ask batch processing with the deal_meeting_router.py prompts
Recommended batch size: 20 concurrent, to stay within cost/rate limits
Workflow: 1) Generate prompts with --output-prompts, 2) Batch process via /zo/ask, 3) Write B36 files, 4) Run --apply-results to create deal_activities for high-relevance meetings
Consider filtering meetings first - likely only 30-50% have any deal relevance
Meetings older than 6 months may not need routing (historical archive)

workflow_steps: 2. Create Python script that reads prompts.jsonl and calls /zo/ask for each
3. Parse LLM JSON responses and write B36_DEAL_ROUTING.json to each meeting folder
5. For meetings with relevance >= 0.70, add deal_activities entries
